title: FG_AccelS Property
description:
This property sets acceleration of force guide objects.

However, this set value is the acceleration for the set trajectory.  The actual acceleration is adjusted by the force control functions.

Values

Minimum value 1

Maximum value 200

Default:  50
see_also:
Applies To

FollowMove Object, PressProbe Object, ContactProbe Object, PressMove Object

AccelR Property
